title: Empower Financial DnA Platform Engagement Kickoff
description: Engagement kickoff deck pattern — team photo, scope, timeline, logistics, next steps

slides.title: Scope of Work
bullets: Kickoff & Onboarding — Establish project governance, communication cadences, and team structure. Confirm system access, complete internal handoffs, onboard Snowflake team to Dev environment.
Discovery & Planning — Conduct discovery, analysis, and architectural design. Define environment strategy (Dev/UAT/Prod/DR) and physical architecture. Assess data sources and document assumptions.

Build — Finalize data modeling approach, PII classification, ingestion tooling, and security architecture. Deliver IaC, DevOps, dbt development standards, error handling, and data quality framework designs.
User Acceptance Testing — 2 weeks of support for customer to validate solution and remediate defects.
Deployment — Provide deployment support for solution.
Project Closure — Provide 1 Knowledge Transfer Session (with recording).
Project Management — Project Planning/Replanning, Schedule Development, Scope Management, Risk Management, and Progress Reporting.

phases.title: Foundational Discovery & Roadmap
phases.description: Define the blueprint: align on scope, map source systems, and design the foundation that will scale beyond this engagement.
activities: Align on business priorities, success criteria, and expansion goals
Identify priority sources and map the future ingestion roadmap
Review source system architecture, data availability, and access requirements
Validate Snowflake access, identity, and cloud storage readiness
Define the scalable framework architecture and milestone execution plan
phases.outcome: A clear blueprint and expansion roadmap before build begins

phases.title: Guided Implementation & Advisory
phases.description: Build the reusable framework: implement a secure foundation and scalable patterns your team can use to onboard new sources and deploy additional use cases.
activities: Establish a secure, governance-ready Snowflake foundation (RBAC, tagging, policies)
Implement medallion architecture as a reusable template for future data domains
Enable initial source ingestion with repeatable patterns and playbooks
Build reusable transformation standards your team can apply to new sources
Productionize AI use cases with evaluation frameworks and handoff playbooks
phases.outcome: A secure, scalable foundation and reusable framework your team can extend

phases.title: Enablement, Tracking & Future Roadmapping
phases.description: Ensure delivery quality, validate the blueprint, and equip your team to operate and expand independently.
activities: Weekly working sessions and backlog reviews
Milestone check-ins to validate framework completeness and reusability
Final review to confirm blueprint outcomes and team readiness
Roadmap workshop: define the next wave of source systems and use cases
phases.outcome: A validated blueprint and roadmap — ready to operate, expand, and scale

slides.title: Program Timeline
slides.subtitle: Based on the scope, we recommend the following timeline for the delivery of the engagement.

slides.title: Engagement Logistics
left_bullets: Weekly Status Meetings — Weekly Wednesday (existing call), 30-min review of status report and gap coverage.
Backlog Review & Sprint Planning — Weekly Tuesday at 2:30PM EDT, 30 min to review items in pipeline for the following sprint.
Working Sessions / Ad-hoc Meetings — Available 8–5PM Local Time within team availability.
Weekly Status Reports — Activities from previous week, planned for next week, Challenges/Issues/Risks.
right_bullets: Method of Access — Snowflake will use VDI to access Customer Assets unless directed otherwise in writing.
Code Collaboration — Git-based repository; Snowflake team commits to customer-approved branch.
Project Management — Snowflake PM tool used for backlog, sprint planning, and milestone tracking.
Communication — Primary channel: Teams/Slack; escalation path defined in RACI.

steps.label: Onboarding Access
steps.description: Provide names of Snowflake architects to customer for DEV environment onboarding (VDIs take ~2 weeks after SOW signing).

steps.label: Data Readiness
steps.description: Customer to provide data source information and confirm data is accessible in Bronze layer prior to build phase.

steps.label: Kickoff Follow-up
steps.description: Snowflake to send finalized Kickoff deck and schedule initial discovery sessions.

steps.label: Account Integrations
steps.description: Account Engineering to engage on definition of account integrations, Snowflake account structure, and sensitive data approach.
